calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Frank Sandelmann, 310.318.1220 for Defendant/Moving parey Pamela Jackson.
No other appearances.

The issues raised in the tentative ruling are discussed. (1) Mr. Sandelmann informs the Court that the Plaintiff's bankruptcy has been converted from Chapter 13 to Chapter 7. He further states that if a bankruptcy trustee is appointed all claims will transferred and become the property of the bankruptcy estate. (2) Mr. Sandelmann argues that the person who has Power of Attorney can not act as a lawyer for the Plaintiff.

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT PAMELA JACKSON's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Taken Unde Submission. Defendant to submitt a proposed order granting dismissal. Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
